examples: Symptoms include tiredness, paleness, and lethargy.
Becky roused up from her lethargy of distress and showed good interest in the proceedings.
Animals which save energy by hibernation or lethargy (e. g. bats or hedgehogs) live much longer than those which are always active
The toddler had diarrhoea, lethargy and did not want to eat, the GMC was told.
If so, the country was struck with a massive wave of lethargy starting five years ago.
